'''Nerfloaf''' was a dish made from the meat of a [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]]. A nerfloaf prepared by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kenth Hamner]] caused his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Izal Waz]], to go into a [[Salt/Legends|salt]] binge that temporarily threw him off his path to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knighthood]].

{{Food-stub}}
